name: Home / Memory Search
desc: One-task default: active space, search, compact results, no wall of controls

name: Memory Detail Inspector
desc: Selected memory with provenance, metadata slots, safe actions

name: Write / Update Memory
desc: Focused create/update form with risk scope and preview

name: Spaces & Config
desc: Memory spaces as boundaries, config preview, active-space switcher

name: Workspace Registry
desc: Workspace cards, UID provenance, recent activity

name: Services Control
desc: API/WebUI/MCP service health, ports, start/stop controls

name: Embeddings Queue
desc: Embedding jobs, queue health, model/status meters

name: Graph Neighborhood
desc: Selected-memory graph, legend, filters, non-hairball node map

name: Logs & Diagnostics
desc: Loaded log tail, filter, copy actions, diagnostics bundle

name: Maintenance / Danger Zone
desc: Cleanup/reset/archive controls with confirmations and scope
